strengths: Proven experience with full-stack development and AI-agent infrastructure

response.justification: The candidate has relevant technical expertise in full-stack development, event-driven systems, and microservices architecture. Although there's a lack of direct experience in fintech and regulated environments, their background in AI-agent infrastructure and scalable engineering teams is promising.
